narrative:
Precinct Greenwich Village (precinct in Huron County) has 829 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.0 percentage points.
